text:
Now I understand the structure. The current frontend has:
1. A sidebar with tabs: Dashboard, Cost, Appliances, Usage by Rooms, Emissions
2. But looking at the HTML, I only see the main dashboard grid with all cards displayed at once - there's no actual tab switching functionality implemented.

The user wants:
1. Remove "Emissions" tab (since AQI is removed)
2. Make all tabs work (Cost, Appliances, Usage by Rooms)

I need to:
1. Remove the Emissions nav item from the sidebar
2. Implement actual tab switching functionality
3. Create separate views/sections for each tab:
   - Dashboard (current view)
   - Cost
   - Appliances
   - Usage by Rooms

Let me also check the backend to see what API endpoints are available.
